generation.raw_response:
```js
flip(0.6) ? flip(0) : flip(1)
```

This expression has the same marginal distribution as `flip(.4)`: when the condition is true (probability 0.6), it returns `flip(0)` which is always false; when the condition is false (probability 0.4), it returns `flip(1)` which is always true. Thus P(true) = 0.4.
